last_push.commit_message:
fix: close mobile sidebar after selecting a chat

Tapping a chat item in the slide-out sidebar on mobile now closes the
panel immediately so the selected chat is visible right away. Uses the
existing 768px breakpoint (window.innerWidth < 768, matching the
matchMedia check already used for the initial open/closed default).
Desktop behavior is unchanged — the panel stays open.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
